scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @web-scrapper/config && npm run build --workspace @web-scrapper/scraper && npm run build --workspace @web-scrapper/knowledge
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @web-scrapper/config && npm run typecheck --workspace @web-scrapper/config && npm run typecheck --workspace @web-scrapper/scraper && npm run typecheck --workspace @web-scrapper/knowledge
